robots.name: Circuit Simulator
robots.description: Full quantum circuit editor — place H/X/Y/Z/S/T/CNOT/M gates, see state vector + probabilities. Up to 6 qubits, 100-shot sampling.

robots.name: Quantum Teleportation
robots.description: Step-by-step teleportation protocol. Create Bell pair, Alice measures, Bob corrects. Full 3-qubit state vector at each step.

robots.name: Deutsch-Jozsa Algorithm
robots.description: First proof of quantum speedup. Determine if f(x) is constant or balanced in ONE query vs 2^(n-1)+1. Up to 5 qubits (32 inputs).

robots.name: Bloch Sphere
robots.description: 3D qubit visualization — apply gates, see state vector + probabilities. Drag to orbit. Keyboard shortcuts for all gates.

robots.name: Quantum Gates
robots.description: Interactive gate reference — matrix, Bloch rotation, before/after states, properties for 10 standard gates.

robots.name: Entanglement
robots.description: Bell pair experiment with 100-shot statistics. Create, measure, see perfect correlation. Particle effects.

robots.name: Grover's Search
robots.description: Amplitude amplification visualized. 2-6 qubits, adjustable target, auto-run, measurement. Classical vs quantum comparison.
